untranslatable_reason: Cup-and-Handle pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition (cup formation, handle pullback, relative height/width measurements) which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The conditional logic for bear-market vs bull-market preference (tall vs wide patterns) requires geometric pattern analysis beyond available indicators. Exit conditions reference 'Ultimate high achievement' and 'Table 25.5' which are contextual/external references not convertible to indicator signals.
